title: Media und Web Analyst (d/m/w)
required_skills: Data Visualization / BI (Power BI or Tableau)
bonus_skills: Cross-functional collaboration with Media, CX, Data Analytics
missing_skills: Search & Paid Media Analytics (paid logic, bid modelling)
core_responsibilities: Define, consolidate, and govern a holistic KPI framework for Media, Web, and CX; embed it into all marketing processes.
Develop meaningful dashboards and reports that make performance transparent and enable data-driven decisions.
Analyze campaign, channel, and customer journey performance; prepare clear readouts for Marketing and Sales stakeholders.
Act as the central go-to partner for KPI and measurement logic, working closely with Media, CX, and Data Analytics teams.
Apply predictive and AI-supported analytics (forecasting, segmentation, anomaly detection) to identify trends early and prioritize optimizations.
Advise Marketing Managers on KPI definition, measurement logic, and performance interpretation; establish CLV-based steering as decision basis.
recommended_emphasis: Highlight KPI framework design and governance experience from multiple roles (HSBC budget dashboards, Hapag-Lloyd customer journey analysis)
Emphasize dashboard and reporting deliverables delivered to executives (C-level data storytelling, executive dashboards at Minth Group)
Position campaign performance analysis and funnel/conversion analytics as core competency
Stress cross-functional collaboration with marketing and sales stakeholders
Mention any experience with Power BI, Tableau, or similar BI tools explicitly
Address German language proficiency if applicable

company_info.size_raw: Deutsche Bank is Deutschlands führende Bank mit globalem Netzwerk — global bank, well-known to be 10,001+ employees
